bundles.name: x402 Base Starter
bundles.tagline: Minimal Hono + n-payment paywall for Base.
bundles.description: The shortest path from zero to a paid HTTP endpoint. Single route, EIP-3009 settlement on Base mainnet or Sepolia testnet.

bundles.name: Multi-chain USDC paywall
bundles.tagline: Auto-route x402 settlement across Base + Arbitrum + Optimism.
bundles.description: One middleware, three chains. Cheapest-route selection plus Wormhole NTT fallback for cross-chain USDC.

bundles.name: BTC-as-treasury agent
bundles.tagline: Lock PegBTC, borrow USDC just-in-time, pay, repay, unlock.
bundles.description: Capital stays in BTC until the moment it's spent. Uses GOAT Network PegBTC lending + OWS vault for vault-bound signing.

bundles.name: Paid MCP server
bundles.tagline: Sell any function as a paid MCP tool, callable by Claude / Cursor / Bedrock.
bundles.description: createPaidMcpServer wraps your handler in a JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP surface with x402-USDC billing built in.

bundles.name: XRPL RLUSD merchant
bundles.tagline: Receive RLUSD on XRPL with auto-created trustline.
bundles.description: x402 paywall settled in Ripple USD on XRPL. Trustline auto-bootstrap; mainnet or testnet.
